flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Madonna University fell 87% between 2006 and 2009 (33.7% → 4.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Madonna University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.6k vs 2.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Madonna University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 1.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Madonna University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.9k → $28.4k).
